Our Story

A Whole Bungalow,
Just for You

Patil Wada is not just a stay — it is an experience. Tucked away in Village Bhaimala near Alibag, this beautifully crafted laterite stone bungalow sits amidst mango orchards, manicured gardens, and open countryside.

When you book Patil Wada, you get the entire property exclusively. No shared spaces, no strangers — just your group, your pool, and your peace.

What We Offer

Everything You
Need & More

🏊
Private Swimming Pool
A sparkling private pool set among mango trees and lush gardens — yours alone for the entire stay.
🌿
Mango Orchard Garden
Wander through a sprawling orchard and beautifully lit garden paths, perfect for morning walks.
🏡
Entire Property — Exclusive
The whole bungalow is yours. No other guests. Complete privacy for families and groups.
🌅
Scenic Balcony Views
Step onto the upper floor balcony for breathtaking views of green fields and the Sahyadri hills.
❄️
AC & Fan Rooms
Stay comfortable year-round with air-conditioned rooms and ceiling fans throughout the property.
🚗
Ample Parking
Spacious parking area on the property for your vehicles — safe and convenient.
🌙
Garden Lighting
Beautiful night-lit garden with pathway lanterns — magical evenings under the open sky.
📍
Near Alibag Beach
Located in Alibag, just a short drive from the famous beach, markets, and local attractions.

A Look Inside
Patil Wada

Find Us

How to Reach
Patil Wada

Patil Wada is conveniently located in the peaceful village of Bhaimala, Alibag — close to the railway track and easily accessible by road from Mumbai and Pune.

Alibag is well-connected via ferry from Mumbai Gateway or by road via the Coastal Highway.

📍
Address
Village Bhaimala, Post, near Railway Track,
Kamarle, Alibag, Maharashtra 402209
